title: Aureline preview hot-reload state, source-mapping projection, and recovery-route record
description: Boundary schema for the hot_reload_state_record frozen in docs/preview/preview_runtime_surface_contract.md. Every preview-runtime hot-reload status badge emits one record. The record carries the spec-frozen six-class hot_reload_state_class vocabulary (applied / partial / restart_required / rebuild_required / failed / unavailable), the strip-projection three-class source_mapping_state_class vocabulary (exact / approximate / unavailable), the inspect-to-source and mapped-edit gating booleans, and the closed list of source-safe recovery routes admissible from the current state. The schema enforces the projection map between source_mapping_state_class and the underlying preview_snapshot mapping_confidence_class, the gate that mapped_edit_admissible requires source_mapping_state_class = exact and hot_reload_state_class in {applied, partial}, and the per-state allowed recovery-route set so failed and rebuild_required states never collapse into a vague stale label. Raw stack frames, raw stderr lines, raw rendered bytes, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, and raw secret values never cross this boundary; opaque snapshot / runtime / log / approval handles and class labels do. Adding a new last_failure_reason_class, recovery_route_class, hot_reload_state_class, source_mapping_state_class, or mapped_edit_blocked_reason_class value is additive-minor and bumps hot_reload_state_schema_version; repurposing an existing field is breaking and requires a new decision row.

hot_reload_state_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this hot-reload state contract. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields and additive enum values do not bump this version.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log, export, or persist. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw IP addresses, raw bearer tokens, and raw stack frames never appear here.

short_summary.description: Reviewer-facing one-sentence summary safe to render in the badge. Raw stack frames, raw stderr lines, raw rendered bytes, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, and raw secret values never appear here.

hot_reload_state_class.description: Spec-frozen six-class hot-reload state vocabulary. applied: most recent source change reflected. partial: some change reflected, some pending. restart_required: dev-server or runtime must restart. rebuild_required: a build step must run. failed: the most recent reload errored. unavailable: hot reload is not supported by this runtime / adapter / target.

source_mapping_state_class.description: Strip-projection three-class source-mapping vocabulary. exact projects from the snapshot's exact_source_mapping. approximate projects from approximate_mapping or unmappable_node_present. unavailable projects from stale_mapping, runtime_only_no_source_mapping, or unknown_mapping.

underlying_mapping_confidence_class.description: Re-export of the six-class mapping_confidence_class from preview_snapshot.schema.json so the projection map between strip and snapshot is locally typed. The schema enforces the projection.

last_failure_reason_class.description: Re-export of the last_failure_reason_class vocabulary from preview_snapshot.schema.json. Required when hot_reload_state_class = failed; null otherwise.

recovery_route_class.description: Closed source-safe recovery-route vocabulary. failed and rebuild_required states MUST cite at least one entry from this list and MUST NOT collapse into a vague stale label.

mapped_edit_blocked_reason_class.description: Closed reason vocabulary explaining why mapped_edit_admissible = false on the current record. not_blocked_edit_admissible is reserved for the case where mapped_edit_admissible = true.

fixture_metadata.description: Optional fixture metadata block carried only by worked fixtures; not part of the production payload.

preview_snapshot_record_ref.description: Opaque ref to the underlying preview_snapshot_record this hot-reload state record projects from. Required.

last_failure_reason_class.description: Required when hot_reload_state_class = failed; null otherwise.

inspect_to_source_admissible.description: True iff source_mapping_state_class in {exact, approximate} AND hot_reload_state_class in {applied, partial, restart_required, rebuild_required}. failed and unavailable set this to false. The schema enforces this gate.

mapped_edit_admissible.description: True iff source_mapping_state_class = exact AND hot_reload_state_class in {applied, partial} AND the underlying snapshot is a visual_edit snapshot in fully_editable_through_mapped_edits. The schema enforces the first two clauses; the third clause is enforced by the consumer surface against the snapshot record.

recovery_routes.description: Source-safe recovery routes admissible from the current state. The schema enforces the per-state allowed set.

transform_manifest_ref.description: Opaque ref to the transform manifest. Required when mapped_edit_admissible = true.

rollback_checkpoint_ref.description: Opaque ref to the rollback checkpoint. Required when mapped_edit_admissible = true.

runtime_log_ref.description: Opaque ref to the runtime log surface. Carried when recovery_routes contains open_runtime_logs_recovery; raw stack frames and raw stderr lines never appear here.

managed_runtime_request_ref.description: Opaque ref to the managed-runtime request. Carried when recovery_routes contains request_managed_runtime_recovery.

allOf.description: Projection map: source_mapping_state_class = exact MUST correspond to underlying_mapping_confidence_class = exact_source_mapping.
Projection map: source_mapping_state_class = approximate MUST correspond to underlying_mapping_confidence_class in {approximate_mapping, unmappable_node_present}.
Projection map: source_mapping_state_class = unavailable MUST correspond to underlying_mapping_confidence_class in {stale_mapping, runtime_only_no_source_mapping, unknown_mapping}.
hot_reload_state_class = failed MUST carry a non-null last_failure_reason_class.
hot_reload_state_class != failed MUST carry last_failure_reason_class = null.
Inspect gate: hot_reload_state_class in {failed, unavailable} forces inspect_to_source_admissible = false.
Inspect gate: source_mapping_state_class = unavailable forces inspect_to_source_admissible = false.
Mapped-edit gate: hot_reload_state_class not in {applied, partial} forces mapped_edit_admissible = false.
Mapped-edit gate: source_mapping_state_class != exact forces mapped_edit_admissible = false.
Mapped-edit gate: mapped_edit_admissible = true requires non-null transform_manifest_ref and rollback_checkpoint_ref and mapped_edit_blocked_reason_class = not_blocked_edit_admissible.
Mapped-edit gate: mapped_edit_admissible = false forbids mapped_edit_blocked_reason_class = not_blocked_edit_admissible.
Recovery-route gate: hot_reload_state_class = applied requires recovery_routes = [no_recovery_required_applied].
Recovery-route gate: hot_reload_state_class = partial requires recovery_routes to contain wait_for_partial_to_settle.
Recovery-route gate: hot_reload_state_class = restart_required requires recovery_routes to contain restart_runtime_recovery.
Recovery-route gate: hot_reload_state_class = rebuild_required requires recovery_routes to contain rebuild_then_reload_recovery.

Recovery-route gate: hot_reload_state_class = failed requires recovery_routes to contain at least one source-safe recovery route from the per-state allowed set and to NOT collapse into a vague stale label (the schema rejects empty / no_recovery_required arrays for failed).

Recovery-route gate: hot_reload_state_class = unavailable allows no_recovery_required_static_preview_unavailable, export_metadata_only_recovery, open_canonical_source_recovery, and request_managed_runtime_recovery.
open_runtime_logs_recovery in recovery_routes requires non-null runtime_log_ref.
request_managed_runtime_recovery in recovery_routes requires non-null managed_runtime_request_ref.

hot_reload_state_record.description: One hot-reload state record emitted by a preview-runtime hot-reload status badge. Carries the six-class hot-reload vocabulary, the strip-projection three-class source-mapping vocabulary, the inspect-to-source and mapped-edit admissibility booleans, and the closed list of source-safe recovery routes admissible from the current state.
